title: Kalisz, Greater Poland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kalisz, Greater Poland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kalisz is a city in Greater Poland with a population of 99,106. One of Poland’s oldest cities, dating back over 2,000 years, known for its historic old town, textile industry, and the nearby Prosna River.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
